rejection_reason: compliance: email_spam_triggers — email contains spam trigger words 'FREE', 'LIMITED TIME', and 'ACT FAST' in subject and body. These words activate spam filters and reduce deliverability.
text:
Subject: FREE demo — LIMITED TIME offer for {{company}}

Hey {{first_name}},

ACT FAST — we're offering a FREE 30-day trial of FlowAI for a limited time only.

This LIMITED TIME offer gives {{company}} FREE access to all premium features, saving your team an average of 2 hours per day.

Don't miss out — claim your FREE trial before this offer expires.

Book your FREE demo today!

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
